text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket reporting in! Nice to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do whatever it takes to win every race I
enter! Including getting luck on my side! That
way, someday, I'll make my dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Trainer, thanks sooo much for choosing
meee! I'm gonna channel these emotions into
running powerrrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
